text:

Log:
  net/freerdp: update to a newer GIT version which builds without patches

  https://github.com/FreeRDP/FreeRDP/pull/2719

  cmdline: syntax samples added
  improve BSD support: devd detection and support, urbdrc
  usb: fixes
